name: PM Workspace
description: Personal PM workspace — markdown + handwritten drawing notes with OCR, a daily digest email assembled from local boards/trackers and optional cloud adapters, and deterministic Monday.com board sync (mirror or two-way)
author: Crow

env_vars.name: PM_SECRETS_FILE
env_vars.description: Optional path to a KEY=VALUE secrets file loaded after $CROW_HOME/env/pm-workspace.env (process.env still wins)

env_vars.name: PM_RUN_CRON
env_vars.description: Set to 1 to run the digest/sync schedulers inside this server process (enable on exactly ONE registration)

env_vars.name: OCR_VISION_URL
env_vars.description: OpenAI-style vision endpoint base URL for handwriting OCR (POSTs to <url>/chat/completions)

env_vars.name: OCR_VISION_MODEL
env_vars.description: Model name for the OCR vision endpoint

env_vars.name: OCR_VISION_API_KEY
env_vars.description: API key for the OCR vision endpoint (default: none)

env_vars.name: PM_EMBED_URL
env_vars.description: OpenAI-style embeddings base URL for best-effort note embedding (POSTs to <url>/embeddings)

env_vars.name: PM_EMBED_MODEL
env_vars.description: Embedding model name

env_vars.name: SMTP_HOST
env_vars.description: SMTP host for digest email

env_vars.name: SMTP_PORT
env_vars.description: SMTP port (default 587)

env_vars.name: SMTP_USER
env_vars.description: SMTP username; also the From address

env_vars.name: SMTP_PASS
env_vars.description: SMTP password

env_vars.name: DIGEST_TO
env_vars.description: Recipient address for the daily digest email

env_vars.name: DIGEST_CRON
env_vars.description: Cron expression for the daily digest (default: 0 7 * * *)

env_vars.name: SYNC_CRON
env_vars.description: Cron expression for Monday sync runs (default: */15 * * * *)

env_vars.name: MONDAY_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Monday.com API v2 token for board sync

env_vars.name: SYNC_CONFIG_FILE
env_vars.description: Path to the sync config JSON (boards, column maps, status maps)

env_vars.name: NTFY_TOPIC
env_vars.description: ntfy.sh topic for a short digest push notification

env_vars.name: NTFY_URL
env_vars.description: Alternate ntfy base URL (default https://ntfy.sh)

env_vars.name: GOOGLE_TOKEN_FILE
env_vars.description: Path to a Google OAuth2 authorized_user JSON for calendar/drive digest sections

env_vars.name: CROW_GATEWAY_URL
env_vars.description: Public gateway URL used in digest footer links

env_vars.name: CROW_TASKS_DB_PATH
env_vars.description: Path to the kanban tasks DB (default $CROW_DATA_DIR/tasks.db)

env_vars.name: PLANNER_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID
env_vars.description: Drive folder where approved planned-events feed files are written for an external agent (e.g. Power Automate) to create real calendar events

env_vars.name: PLANNER_CATEGORY
env_vars.description: Marker category stamped on planner-created calendar events; the reconcile loop-guard matches on it (default: Crow Plan)

env_vars.name: PLANNER_CRON
env_vars.description: Cron expression for planner export/reconcile runs (default: */15 * * * *)

notes: Notes (markdown + pressure-sensitive drawing with OCR), a daily digest, and deterministic Monday.com sync. Boards/kanban remain the job of the tasks bundle and Bot Board tracker tools — this bundle reads them for the digest and writes them only via the sync engine.
